pr_description:
- NPM package: Support for inject `@react-native-community/cli`
- DeltaPatcher: Patch `deltaBundle.added` and `deltaBundle.modified` if exists
- deltaUrlToBlobUrl: Should use `revisionId` as query key (Also in RN 0.58)

- NPM package: Support for inject `@react-native-community/cli`
- DeltaPatcher: Patch `deltaBundle.added` and `deltaBundle.modified` if exists
- deltaUrlToBlobUrl: Should use `revisionId` as query key (Also in RN 0.58)
I've faced issue where rndebbuger-open command does not work with new version of cli (as code of cli has changed). I prepared an update where new cli is supported.
